settings.title: Settings
settings.usernameWarning: Choose your username wisely — inappropriate names may result in a sanction.
settings.name: Name
settings.nameCooldown: You can change your name once every 30 days. {{ days }} day remaining.
settings.nameCooldownPlural: You can change your name once every 30 days. {{ days }} days remaining.
settings.nameChangeWarning: Once changed, you'll need to wait 30 days before changing again.
settings.mainEmailNeverShown: Your main account email is never shown publicly.
settings.publicProfileDesc: Allow others to find and view your profile

account.title: Account Settings
account.signOutDesc: Sign out of your account on this device.
account.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account, profile, and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

privateModal.title: Make your profile private?
privateModal.description: With a private profile, you won't be able to join or be invited to events. Other players won't be able to find you either.
privateModal.descriptionBold: you won't be able to join or be invited to events

confirmRemoveWantToPlay.title: Remove game?
confirmRemoveWantToPlay.message: This will remove the game from your Want to Play list. You can add it again anytime.

confirmMarkPlayed.title: Mark as played?
confirmMarkPlayed.message: This action cannot be undone. The selected games will be moved to your played list and won't appear here anymore.

addGameModal.noGamesFound: No games found in your collection

publicProfile.notFoundDesc: This profile is private or doesn't exist.
publicProfile.comingSoon: This player's gaming history will appear here soon!

setup.welcomeDesc: Set up your profile so other players can find and know you. You can always update this later.
setup.useRealName: Use my real name when contacted by the administration
setup.useRealNameDesc: If disabled, the administration will refer to you by your username. Your name is never shown publicly either way.
setup.usernameWarning: Choose your username wisely — inappropriate names may result in a sanction.
setup.emailNeverDisplayed: Your main email and this backup email will never be displayed on your public profile.
setup.showGameCollectionDesc: Let others see what games you own
